name: Minnesota

Handle MN's unique Sunday sale restrictions and municipal regulations
Multi-tier pricing with built-in Minnesota compliance
problem: Minnesota excise at $0.46/case calculated manually across hundreds of SKUs

how_it_works: Set up Minnesota excise rates once — Ruby applies them to every transaction
